landing.hero_description: Report FGM and abuse anonymously. Get help immediately. Your voice matters.
landing.ngo_description: Manage incidents, support victims, coordinate responses

features.space_description: Your privacy and safety are our priority

dashboard.choose_what_happened: What do you need help with?
dashboard.anonymity_reminder: (You can report without giving your name)
dashboard.need_help_now: Are You in Danger Right Now?
dashboard.emergency_description: If someone is hurting you or you need immediate help, we can connect you to a trained counselor right now.
dashboard.help_available: Help is available 24/7. What happened is not your fault.

incident_types.fgm_description: Someone cut me or wants to cut me
incident_types.violence_description: Someone hurt me or threatens me
incident_types.child_description: A child is being physically or sexually abused
incident_types.labour_description: A child is being forced to work instead of going to school

report.title: Tell Your Story Safely
report.anonymous_notice: We don't track your phone. You don't have to give your name. Share only what feels safe.
report.description_placeholder: Write as much or as little as you want. There's no right or wrong way to tell your story.
report.description_help: Helpful to share: What happened • When • Who (if you know) • If you're still in danger
report.upload_files: Upload photos, videos, or documents if you have them
report.file_types: Max 2 files. Supported: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4
report.category_help: This helps us connect you with the right people, but you can skip this.
report.contact_optional: ⚠️ Only give contact info if it's SAFE. If someone checks your phone, it might not be safe.
report.contact_method_placeholder: How would you like to be contacted?

contact_methods.app_only: I'll check back on this app (no contact needed)

report.best_time: When is it SAFE to contact you?
report.best_time_placeholder: When is it safe to contact you?

contact_times.reach_out: Only contact if I reach out first

report.accuracy_notice: Just tell us what you remember - that's enough.
report.submission_success_message: Your report has been sent. We will review it within 24 hours.
report.submission_error: Unable to submit report. Please try again.

confirmation.report_sent: ✓ Your report is safe with us
confirmation.review_notice: ✓ We will review it within 24 hours. ✓ You did the right thing by speaking up.
confirmation.what_next: What do you need right now?
confirmation.help_description: Hospitals, shelters, and support centers in your area
confirmation.rights_description: What the law says about FGM and abuse in Nigeria
confirmation.safety_description: How to stay safe if you're still in danger
confirmation.safety_message: Help is available anytime. What happened is not your fault.

auth.join_network: Join our network of trusted organizations
auth.sign_in_dashboard: Sign in to access your admin dashboard
auth.sign_in_org: Sign in to your organization dashboard
auth.no_account: Don't have an account? Register your NGO
auth.register_description: Register your organization to start managing incident reports
auth.terms_agree: I agree to the terms of service and privacy policy
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.check_email: Please check your email for a verification code.
